name: vault-reporting
description: Example declarative extension that combines local link metadata, link widgets, and task summaries for agent-readable reports.

permissions.reason: Uses the local note index, link graph, tags, tasks, and publish metadata already available to Forge.

contributes.label: Vault reporting metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for Markdown health reports, maintenance summaries, and agent triage notes.

contributes.label: Link health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported link-health sidebar widget for broken-link review.

contributes.label: Backlinks
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported backlinks sidebar widget for report context.

contributes.label: Task summary
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task summary sidebar widget for maintenance tasks.
